creator: ohauer@FreeBSD.org
text:
Hi Marco,

I know, but rc.sendmail is telling this, but it tells this now since FreeBSD 5.0 and in my opinion the deprecation message from rc.sendmail should be removed.

I know the handbook lists all dedicated sendmail progs and how to disable them, but the same can be done with one line containing the NONE keyword.
I even don't see a benefit to install an alternative mailer that can handle everything and disabling only parts of sendmail.

See discussion http://lists.freebsd.org/pipermail/svn-ports-head/2016-January/111165.html
